entry.title: Re: Collective Billing next month
entry.content:
My take is a little different

For delivery based billing.  Yes - create a calendar where the only "working day" is last day of month.  Then all deliveries, have this billing date.

For order based billing (or at least when I was testing billing plan) - it just takes the date you type in as the billing date.

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi Brian (@Brian_Kirkeby),
the business catalog is only needed for Joule for Developers (in ADT) and is currently only available in public cloud development systems (BTP ABAP and S/4HANA public cloud). The ABAP AI SDK does not require authorizations. 
Best regards
Karl

entry.title: Re: Propose Items in Create Sales Order fiori app
entry.content: Did you find a solution? I stuck on the same topic.

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition 2505?
entry.content:
Hi, Markus.
Thank you very much for your answer.
Today we run MDG Classic in S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023 02 (10/2024) - where we create BP Change Request.
(In addition, we replicate the data to SAP ECC with SOAP - BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In )

But we find that this SOAP service is difficult to use as an API against external systems - for creating BP Change Request in S4HANA.
We have looked at odata MDG_BP_SRV in S4HANA- do you think it can be used?

entry.title: Tracking of Organization goals in SuccessFactors Goal Management
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are implementing Goal Management in SAP SuccessFactors and have a few queries regarding goal cascading and tracking.

Let's say a Department Head creates a goal and cascades it to all employees in that department — across multiple levels (e.g., 4–5 layers deep). While the Goal Alignment Chart provides a visual view of alignment, it doesn't offer a clear picture of actual progress tracking (e.g., over-achievement or lagging) across the organization.

Our specific questions are:

  1. How can the department head track the actual progress (like % complete or traffic light status) of the cascaded goal across the hierarchy — especially during mid-year reviews?

  2. Is there a way to view aggregated or summarized status (e.g., average % completion, red/yellow/green status) for a cascaded goal across all recipients?

  3. When a goal is cascaded to several levels, we observed that the top-level manager can only view progress up to two levels down.

    • Is there a standard configuration or best practice to extend visibility to more levels or the full hierarchy?

  4. What is SAP’s recommended best practice for organizational goal tracking, especially in terms of:

    • Visibility for leaders

    • Monitoring aggregated performance

    • Mid-year checkpoint reviews

🛠️ Configuration:

  • We’re using the Latest Goal Management

  • Goal Alignment Chart is enabled

  • Goal Plan includes fields like % complete, status, and comments

Would appreciate any insights, recommended configurations, or SAP Notes/KBA references.

Thanks and regards,
Namsheed.

entry.title: Re: Stop automatic PR/PO conversion for MRP controllers
entry.content:
PR to PO conversion doesn't happen through MRP run. PR or Planned order creation happens through MRP run. If you have scheduled ME59N (RM06BB30) through background, you can exclude MRP controllers in the selection screen to restrict creation of PO for specific range of MRP controllers.

 

Regards,

Kishan

entry.title: SAP CHOTA Talks Q2 2025: A Resounding Success and a Glimpse into the Future of SAP in Hyderabad!
entry.content:
Hyderabad, the city of pearls and burgeoning tech hub, recently played host to a truly exceptional event: SAP CHOTA Talks Q2 2025. This quarterly gathering, already a staple in the SAP community calendar, outdid itself this time around, bringing together an impressive confluence of industry leaders, seasoned experts, and enthusiastic tech aficionados. As an attendee, I can confidently say it was an experience that left me both inspired and incredibly well-informed.

The air buzzed with anticipation as Dr. Mahesh Kumar CV kicked off the event with a visionary opening address. His emphasis on the critical role of community collaboration in driving innovation resonated deeply, setting the perfect tone for a day filled with insightful discussions and knowledge sharing. It was a powerful reminder that in the rapidly evolving world of SAP, collective intelligence and shared experiences are paramount.

One of the undeniable highlights was the session led by Venkata Chivukula from MOURI Tech, who masterfully explored the integration of Generative AI in SAP. This wasn't just a theoretical deep dive; Venkata showcased real-world applications, painting a vivid picture of the transformative power of AI in enterprise operations. It was fascinating to see how Generative AI is moving beyond buzzwords and offering tangible solutions that can truly revolutionize how businesses operate.

"Ask Anything" segment was a whirlwind of practical wisdom. With a panel featuring Arogya Gallela, Sultana Khan, Poonam Singh, and Bhavani Prasad Jogu, participants had the invaluable opportunity to gain direct insights into pressing topics like SAP HCM, ABAP on HANA, and customer-centric solutions. The candid responses and practical advice shared by these experts were truly invaluable, providing actionable takeaways for everyone in attendance.

Another session that truly resonated was the thought-provoking panel discussion on navigating the migration to S/4HANA, featuring Gupta Kandula, Immanuel Kolagani, and Venkat. For many businesses, the S/4HANA migration is a significant undertaking, and this panel offered a wealth of actionable strategies and real-world experiences. Their insights provided a clear roadmap for organizations undergoing this critical transformation, alleviating many common concerns and offering a sense of direction.

Dr. Mahesh Kumar CV, led a crucial session on reskilling in the S/4HANA era. In an ever-evolving technological landscape, the need for continuous learning and adaptation is paramount. Dr. Mahesh provided clear learning pathways, equipping professionals with the knowledge and resources to stay ahead of the curve in this fast-paced environment. It was a proactive approach to skill development that was much appreciated by the audience.

Beyond the insightful sessions, the event was made even more memorable by a delightful culinary experience from "Insta Bites." Instabites Sushi, courtesy of Gowtham Chagarlamudi, proved to be a fantastic addition, enhancing both the networking opportunities and the overall enjoyment of the day. Good food always fosters good conversations, and this was certainly the case at SAP CHOTA Talks Q2.

As the event drew to a close, there was a palpable sense of excitement and satisfaction in the room. A big thank you is due to the entire SAP community for their active participation, to our esteemed speakers for their invaluable contributions, and to MOURI Tech for their collaborative spirit. Their dedication truly made this event a resounding success.

The inspiring conversations and renewed connections forged at SAP CHOTA Talks Q2 2025 have left us all eagerly anticipating the upcoming Q3 edition. If this quarter's event is any indication, the future of SAP in Hyderabad is bright, driven by a vibrant community dedicated to innovation and collaboration. I, for one, am already looking forward to more impactful discussions and collaborations in the next edition!

For more detailed information, please refer to the blog by Dr. Mahesh: https://community.sap.com/t5/hyderabad-blog-posts/sap-chota-talks-hyderabad-2025-q2-recap/ba-p/14106053

@MaheshCV @Ruthvik_Chowdary

entry.title: Individual and collective requirements Details
entry.content: what is Individual and collective requirements in Material Master MRP4 View and share Difference between a clear example and its Impact MRP planning and Uses

entry.title: Re: ABAP Adaptation for Any Middleware to CPI/IS Migration ( RFC to Webservice )
entry.content:
Hi Hashini,

but you also need to keep in mind, that there are some scenarios, where RFC cannot be replaced with WebService.

For example in your code above (5.5) I see that the RFC call is performed IN BACKGROUND TASK, which means it is a transactional call with guaranteed delivery exactly once and an automatic retry mechanism in case of failure (e.g. network is temporarily down).
The SOAP call you are replacing this with, however, is a synchronous call and as far as I know does not provide an automatic retry mechanism in case of network failures.

Other examples are scenarios, where you have multiple calls in one "Logical Unit of Work (LUW)", which need to be committed/rolled back as one single atomic unit. Don't know, whether something like this can be achieved with WebService calls?!

And a final consideration might be performance, especially when mass data is processed. RFC (being a binary protocol) is in most use-cases several factors faster than WebService/SOAP (which is a text-based protocol that needs time-consuming XML-parsing and -rendering).

entry.title: Class FI_TAX_SERVICES causes error RW033 after upgrade
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In my code before calling FM BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST I call method calculate in class FI_TAX_SERVICES .

It works fine in SP27.

We upgraded to SP29. When running the code with the same file  

In SP27 a document is created but in SP29 error RW033 (Accounting Interface: Balance in Transaction Currency                   170.00- )  is displayed.

I see that methods CALCULATE1 and CALCULATE2 were added to the class, and the code is changed.

In the debug I can see that in SP27 AMT_DOCCUR has the original values (1000, -1000) and therefore the balance is 0.  But in SP29 AMT_DOCCUR in row 2 was changed to 1170 and therefore the balance is 170 (-1000, 1170).

Why does the method change 1000 to 1170?

In SP27

In method calculate  of class  FI_TAX_SERVICES:

In SP29

In method calculate1 (which is called from method CALCULATE) of class FI_TAX_SERVICES:

In SP29: When calling the method I tried to add the parameter DIFFERENCE_IS_TAX  = 'X' , but it did not help.

Do I need to add another parameter?

Is there something else that I should do?

Thank you in advanced

Hagit

entry.title: Re: Empowering business to manage Decisions in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Great blogpost! This feature will give business users more autonomy to manage and maintain business rules and decision logic!

entry.title: Re: my data action has no error , but it is not working ,
entry.content:
I was missing some profit center data, in my br_product now it is working fine 

but that calculation part is showing different result as expected like it is adding things 12 times

entry.title: Automate dropping of local tables in SAP Datasphere with SQL
entry.content:
Hi,

I am quite new to SAP Datasphere.

I have some task chains scheduled for daily run.

I have a few local tables scheduled for daily deletion as well.

I'd like to have a way to automate this local tables deletion, in case that i have to manually run the task chains again and they need these local tables to be previously deleted. Its is a risk to delete them manually one by one, as i can miss something.

As i understand, i cannot have this being done within a Task Chain nor have such commands as "drop table" using SQL View as this is a data manipulation.

Is there a way to automate the dropping of tables with SQL inside Datasphere?

Or any other option?

Appreciate your help.

Thanks 

Sravan

Can you please help?. Thanks, Javier 

The Request URL is ...../content-repository/v2/cards/cards.sac.technicalallocation/..... and Status Code is 404 Not Found:

    1. code: 1010
    2. message: "The file was not found in the content repository."
  1. message: "The card couldn't be retrieved."
  2. status: 404

entry.title: Re: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Mod...
entry.content:
Thank you @ Nikhil ..

Actually That functionality is possible only if both Analytical Models originate from DataSphere. Unfortunately, the feature we previously had in Web Intelligence (WEBI) for merging datasets is not available in SAC. It’s quite limiting that a data analytics tool like SAP SAC lacks such essential capabilities.

entry.title: Re: BMK – Return to Supplier - no outbound delivery created
entry.content:
I believe the solution is not currently available in public cloud for customized document types. Since yours is a ZNB document and only solution available in public cloud is mentioned in note - 2958447, better to use standard instead of a custom document type as certain configurations are not released in SSCUI/Activity in CBC.

Regards,

Kishan

entry.title: Guidance on Building an APK for SAP Fiori Application with Zebra Laser Scanner Integration
entry.content:
We are developing a SAP Fiori application and need to integrate it with a Zebra device equipped with a laser scanner (specifically, a Zebra scanner with laser scanning capabilities). Our goal is to build an APK file for this Fiori application to run on Android-based Zebra devices, ensuring seamless barcode scanning functionality.

  • APK Build Process: What are the steps to build a custom SAP Fiori Client APK that integrates with the Zebra laser scanner? Please provide details on the tools, plugins, or SDKs required (e.g., Zebra Scanner SDK for Android or SAP Fiori Client Cordova plugins).
  • Zebra Scanner Integration: How can we ensure the Zebra laser scanner is properly integrated into the Fiori application? Is there a specific Cordova plugin or Zebra SDK (e.g., DataWedge or EMDK) recommended for laser scanner functionality?

entry.content:

I have added a header/footer in our Offer Letter Templates example: "Staff in confidence", in every pages.

However whenever there are edits to the letters, the headers and footers might go out of alignment and pushed to the next page.

Is there a way to fix the headers/footers similar to what we can do in MS Word? Tx

 

Zul

entry.title: What is the importance of Releasing the maintenance order?
entry.content:
Hello,

I need blow clarification regarding the release of Maintenance order.

I have created maintenance order and Service Purchase requisition (PR) but I have not released maintenance order. the Purchase team member has created Purchase order according to this PR.

My confusion is that It is right business process or wrong one

I think to create PO we have to release the maintenance order first. if Maintenance order is not released then system should pass the error.

Please correct my understanding if wrong.

Thank you..

entry.title: Amount In LC- Goods Receipt (Asset Purchase Order (PO))
entry.content:
Hello, 

After performing a Goods Receipt (GR) with movement type 101 for a Purchase Order (PO) with account assignment category "A" (Asset), the Amount in Local Currency (LC) is not displayed in the PO History tab or in relevant tables like MSEG or EKBE.

As per my understanding, this is due to the "GR non-valuated" checkbox being selected for the asset account assignment. In such cases, the amount is only updated after the Invoice Receipt (IR) is posted via MIRO.

Before the IR is posted, is there any standard way to view or track the GR amount for such Asset POs?

Thanks in advance for your answers!

entry.title: SuccessFactors RCM Issue while Scheduling Interview
entry.content:
We are encountering an issue during the interview scheduling process in our system. When we schedule an interview by selecting a date and time slot for a candidate and proceed to send the invitation using the appropriate email template, we notice that two separate interview invitation emails are being sent.

According to the audit trail under the candidate’s application in the talent pipeline, one of these emails is the correct invitation based on the selected template, while the other is entirely different and unexpected.

We have already reviewed the email trigger settings related to interview scheduling, and all such triggers are currently disabled.

Please advice, Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Period is open in MM but still is not allowing to pos...
entry.content: Hi Vijay, if you can check MMRV screen shots. over there it's mentioned that in Month/Year (05/2025 & 06/2025) is opened. so i don't think that this is the right solution

entry.title: Understanding the UK Starter Checklist in SuccessFactors Onboarding
entry.content:
The P45 is given to the employee by the employer once they have finished work, it is sent after their last salary payment.  Depending on the employee’s last day and payroll date it can take 2-4 weeks to be sent to the employee.  The P45 summarizes how much the employee has earnt, and how much tax they have paid in the current tax year.  This is not to be confused with a P60 that summarizes a whole tax year.  As a result, it will have a tax code that the new employer can use to ensure they have the correct tax deducted from their earnings.

If the employee leaves employment on a Friday and starts the following Monday, then they will not have a P45.  Hence their new employer will ask them to complete the UK Starter Checklist.  This document allows the new employees to collect the correct information and input this into payroll and hence calculate the correct tax.

If an employee does not provide a P45 or complete the UK Starter Checklist then the employer will put them on an emergency tax code to deduct tax, which can be at a higher rate.

How does this work in SuccessFactors Onboarding? If you enable the UK compliance form you just see one option.

 When they launch the New Starter checklist the first question asks them if they have a P45. If they say Yes, then they are asked to add the P45 as an attachment. Once they have submitted it, the P45 will be available from the onboarding dashboard.

If the click ‘No’ then the system will ask them to complete an electronic version of the UK New Starter Checklist, with some data being merged from the employee record.

The form is dynamic and has a series of questions which they need to answer and based on the responses it will determine the next sections to complete.

Once they have submitted it, it will be available from the onboarding dashboard.  If you are using Employee Central Payroll as they payroll system, there is a standard integration from UK Starter checklist into ECP that can set up to map the data from the document into ECP.

If the person never completes the UK starter checklist, then the employee will just have an emergency tax code until HMRC (His Majesty's Revenue & Customs) can ‘find’ their record via their National Insurance number.  Note the UK start checklist is not a ‘right to work’ process, it is just about ensuring you pay the right tax.

entry.title: Unable to Perform Return PO from Block Stock for External Refurbishment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,We are facing a business process challenge related to stock transfers and return processing in our organization structure, which comprises one plant and multiple storage locations (Slocs) managed via SAP MM and EWM.
Business Process Context:
1)All materials received from vendors or internal manufacturing are distributed to various Slocs within the same plant using STO (Stock Transport Order) processes.
2)Materials typically have a warranty period of at least 10 years.
3) If a material fails within the warranty period, it is returned either to the internal manufacturing unit if it is a minor repair and can be repaired within own capabilities or it is forwarded to the external vendor (Factory) for refurbishment or Replacement.
4) Such defective materials are moved to blocked stock using transaction MIGO (Transfer Posting to Blocked Stock) So that it is not issued inadvertently from any of  Slocs and to ensure safety of users

entry.title: Re: SDA connection from SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
"2600176 - SAP HANA Smart Data Access Supported Remote Sources" is updated regularly.

According to note version 38, released on: 2024-11-21: SAP HANA Cloud is supported

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the SAP TechEd Group! Be sure to JOIN for regular updates.
entry.content: looking forward to it

entry.title: Re: What’s new in Mobile development kit client 24.11
entry.content:
I read the guide and checked the query. If OAuth authentication is used, how should it be handled? In my query, there is no custom parameter like custom_cookie="JSESSIONID:xxx".
sample link 
ilodata host=mobile-xx-xxxx.cfapps.sap.hana.ondemand.com port=443 enable_https=yes service_root=xxxx enable_debug_logging=yes custom_header="Authorization: Bearer {oauthToken}" extra_stream_parms=skip_certificate_name_check=true custom_header="X-SMP-APPID:{appid}" defining_query=xxx custom_cookie="__VCAP_ID__:xxx" custom_cookie="JSESSIONID:xxx"

MY QUERY
./ilodata host=vsf-dev-6yw70r3d-dev-com-grasim-smamaiapp.cfapps.in30.hana.ondemand.com port=443 enable_https=yes service_root=vsf-dev-6yw70r3d-dev-com-grasim-smamaiapp.cfapps.in30.hana.ondemand.com/com.grasim.smaMaiApp enable_debug_logging=yes custom_header="Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImprdSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdnNmLWRldi02eXc3MHIzZC5hdXRoZW50aWNhdGlvbi5pbjMwLmhhbmEub25kZW1hbmQuY29tL3Rva2VuX2tleXMiLCJraWQiOiJkZWZhdWx0LWp3dC1rZXktOTFjMTM5MzRhYyIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCIsImppZCI6ICI0ZXpTVlIwTWJsTzBqNEZLeVV4eStubEJmbStSL0hUa01teHhTRWxPaXUwPSJ9..pzagLBzU27K-lSmtls8MjYT1kra9l_K3RmfPeU-dNnpYBOV2RUSEOnsP_kIaiav_kwwHf6PSFVA3xa9Y5Uvuky45X_79rQADGhGo5pH_H_hr_2ZLlL9zFd7NVXmuAyM4Iy9fNMaxaK0RdI4qCDTxQ5V0ee3-y15IIOwjwcbWYQU-laKk8yacU3Na3hssOhqY9lmlLdQLoqYOItv_g27LYTNg2ubYsXyJKkVRxD6a2JAAaEZvTEpCMPntE2IywQZvU3-5gjVJfsb-MSrBnsyV14ThgUc_kW_TuUvca3Z7mJTmOaSFjeCMfOGD3H6fnFx6OVxAoYR_RwBE1uOEsNqM6A" extra_stream_parms=skip_certificate_name_check=true custom_header="X-SMP-APPID:com.grasim.smaMaiApp" defining_query=PlantMaintainGetSet custom_cookie="__VCAP_ID__:2514bd74-18e7-4285-53de-cc5229714dda

Error

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi @karl_kessler , 
I thought that the Joule For For Developers (in ADT) also was available for private cloud versions with the note implementation. I had missed that it was only the ABAP AI SDK that was "downported".
Too bad - it was the Joule part we were looking forward to play around with.

Thank you for the clarification.
Best regards
Brian

entry.title: Group Reporting- Data Migration & Cutover Approach
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are on a S4HANA Cloud journey with Group Reporting. I was looking for some best industry practice for a Data Migration and Cutover. As we are going to use 3 different ledgers from S4HANA with different Fiscal years,  The Go-live is expected to be April 2026. The fiscal periods are 1)July-June, 2)October- September, 3)April-March, which have 3 different versions in group reporting.

We are on S4HANA 202502 Cloud with No GRDC. All entities in S4HANA. 

We were thinking of 2 approaches: 

1) No re-run of consolidation

Load the Mar 2026 consolidated YTD balance in local and group currency in group reporting via a flat file for all the versions. Then the release universal journal will execute from April 2026. And the subsequent first time consolidation can use data as balance carry forward. 

2) Re-run consolidation

Load Periodic balances of complete fiscal year for all the versions and re -run consolidation tasks. This will be used for first time balance carry forward.

We wanted to know any suggested approach.

Hope to hear some advice,

Thanks

SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Data Migration

entry.title: Re: Stop automatic PR/PO conversion for MRP controllers

entry.title: Re: [C4C] Live Activity Center - default search category?
entry.content: Have you got any reply? We would like to set Tickets as default search category as well.

entry.title: Getting the error CVI_S4CONV_UTIL-002 even when customer and vendor data is harmonized into BP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have carried out the data harmonization of customer and vendor. For some of the entries, the address was initially the same so we never selected a leading entry. But the bank data was different, so here we selected Vendor Bank data as leading entry and carried out the synchronization. As a result both customer and vendor synchronized into single BP. So far so good. But now when we try to make changes in the address of either the customer or vendor we end up with the error CVI_S4CONV_UTIL-002 which corresponds to address difference between customer and vendor (and BP Data is not updated).

My question is why do we get this error when already the address is harmonized betweem customer, vendor and BP. We cannot select the leading entry anymore as the customer and vendor dont even appear in CVI_LEDH report. There is still a lot of time before our customers upgrade to S4 and this is causing major concerns in everyday business. Could someone  please tell me if you are aware of any solutions or If I am missing anything? I have spend many hours finding a solution but unfortunately nothing worked except I maintain the same address (which is not feasible as master data is changed very often and for lot of entries) or hard change the  leading entry in the table using debugging. Yes I can also synchronize BP into customer or vendor using FLBP*2 transactions but this has impact on other master data like overwriting bank data of vendor with customer (where customer has no bank data) or vice versa. Therefore I kindly request your help here and guide me how can I proceed further. Thanks. 

Best Regards

Zahid

entry.title: Learning Custom fields description Fill
entry.content: There is any way to fill automatically the description on custom fields using the same as in ID?

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA PP module stock requirement for Sales pendin...
entry.content:
Hi,

MD04 show all materials related elements.

See Here for more details. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/basics-of-md04-how-to-read-layman-approach/qaq-p/10101894 

Regards

entry.title: Exchange rate calculations in PO to GR and IR for SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I have a question about the exchange rate calculation from PO to GR and from PO to IR. I know logic for Fixed price tick, there is no doubt about it.
How is the exchange rate calculated? If the below conditions?
1. PO created for 1 Qty in EUR, let's say 100 EUR, another currency is USD. (Exchange rate is-- 1 EUR = 0.85 USD).- 1st May 2025.
2. GR done on 5th May - Exchange rate -- (1 EUR = 0.90 USD)
3. Invoice done 10th May - Exchange rate -- (1 EUR = 0.95 USD)

Quations
1. In this example does the GR-Based IV make any impact? 
2. Exchange rate gain is the difference in the exchange rate between the M-rate at the Purchase Order Date vs the M-rate at Invoice, OR the exchange rate difference between be M-rate at Goods Receipt vs the M-rate at Invoice?
3. Below configuration path, how does it impact with above example? 
SAP Customising Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Logistics Invoice Verification -> Incoming Invoice -> Configure How Exchange Rate Differences Are Treated
Not able to understand what be impact of these configurations will be if I change ERD Method and ERD calculations? - Note: Please consider the example while explaining.

entry.title: Re: [BTP Workzone] Metadata not found 404
entry.content: Yes I am facing the same issue ?

entry.title: Re: TDMS Time Slice Analysis Error
entry.content: Issue fixed it was due to DMIS and DMIS_CNT component mismatch version in the landscape.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Perform Return PO from Block Stock for Exte...
entry.content:
Hi,

As per my suggestion,  create a separate storage location specifically for defective material. Move all defective stock to this location and then proceed with the Return PO process.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Financial Posting 1GP - Different tax co...
entry.content: Hello Chuma. Did you have the chance to check my previous comment?

entry.title: CDS for list of confirmed customer bank accounts
entry.content:
Hi experts.

In SAP S4HANA Public Cloud I need to create CDS view that provides a list of confirmed customer bank accounts for a certain period.  This is confirmed by application "Confirm Customer List".

But I don't know which basic CDS I can use.

A another solution would be to also use the API, but I don't know which provide the necessary data.

Can anyone help me which CDS/API can be used and they are released for development ?

Thanks,
Roman

entry.title: Re: Individual and collective requirements Details
entry.content:
Hi,

Indicator to Specify the Type of Requirements Allowed for the Dependent Material:

Individual Requirements:
The requirement quantities for the dependent material are recorded separately for each demand source.

Collective Requirements:
The requirement quantities for the dependent material are aggregated across all demand sources

Individual/Collective Requirements for Dependent Requirements 

Regards

entry.title: Integrate SAP CRM WEB UI in BTP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I am trying to Integrate the SAP CRM WEB UI (crm_ui_start) in SAP BTP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition.

Created the Run time destination in the BTP cockpit and created a App with following properties:

 

App UI Technology: WebClient UI
WebClient Application ID: /bsp/sap/crm_ui_start/default.htm
 
After assigning the App to site, it is reaching to CRM system but not able to load the WEB UI page where user can select the business role.
 
PFA the error screen shot for reference.
 
Please let me know if any configuration is missing.
 
Thanks in advance.
 
Regards,
Rohit Gera

entry.title: Re: Mass Creattion of Sub-WBS element
entry.content:
@mohammedrahman4 

Hi Mohammed Rahman,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, you can use the Migration Cockpit app for this purpose. Simply download the relevant template, fill in the required data (including header and sub-WBS elements), and upload it accordingly.
thanks & regards 

ps consultant

entry.title: SAPUI5 Smartfiterbar odata v2 vs macro:filterbar odata v4 typeAhead value suggest
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have two apps, one a bit older using SmartFilter bar on odata V2, and a new one in Flexible Programming model using odata v4.

In the old one fields annotated with a ValueHelp offer automatically some suggested values when the user starts typing. In the new one ValueHelps are there, but suggested values do not show up.
It seems to be possible in the macro bar here:
https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/filterBar/filterBarVMWithTable

So how can i achieve the same? This is one of my Value Help annotations:

<li-code lang="abap"><li-code lang="abap">@UI.lineItem       : [{position: 10}]
      @ui.selectionField : [{position: 10}]
      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
             entity      : {
                 name    : 'YLYR_WBS_ELEMENT_R',
                 element : 'WBSElement'
             },
             additionalBinding: [{
                 localElement: 'ShortID',
                 element : 'ShortID',
                 usage   : #FILTER
            }]
         }]
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'WBSDescription' ]

  key WBSElement         : ps_posid;

Regards,
Michal

entry.title: Re: What is the importance of Releasing the maintenance o...
entry.content:
Hi,

You do not select the field Reservation/Purchase Requisition. As a result, purchase requisitions are only generated when the order is released, and reservations only become relevant to materials planning once the order has been released.

See configuration here SPRO > Plant Maintenance and Customer Service > Maintenance and Service Processing > Maintenance and Service Orders > Functions and Settings for Order Types > Define Change Documents, Collective Purchase Requisition, MRP relevance

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Sapphire 2025: Notes from Day 1 Keynote with a focus on Developers
entry.content: @VictorHo - You can watch the replay here: (3) LinkedIn

entry.title: Re: Enable Now - Publishing as SCORM 1.2 to Docebo (Folde...
entry.content: Thanks Shane 🙂

entry.title: Re: collective orders and dependencies
entry.content: How do I modify the production order after it is released. All efforts appear to be locked out due to the dependency between parent and child with no way to break this dependency. .

entry.title: Re: How to identify Login user as Manager in Add new Employee screen - SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello Karthik,

  • If the supervisor value is being populated on save, then the order of the business rules assigned matters. Try assigning the business rule which populates the supervisor value before the one that is giving the error and check if that works.
  • If your requirement is that the manager gets the error when the email type is set as business (on change) not on save, then the job information section should be filled before the email information section.

In any case, I can give you more suggestions, if you can provide the rule trace of this rule.

BR,
Namratha

entry.title: Re: Stop automatic PR/PO conversion for MRP controllers
entry.content: @Vijay_SAP It's there:

entry.title: Enable Now - Is it possible to change account usernames?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I think the answer to this is no, but I just wanted to be absolutely certain - is it possible in any way (even if via a chargeable service request to SAP) to change account usernames in SAP Enable Now?

Many thanks,

Andrew

entry.title: Creation customer folder in usr/sap/SID/ is not possible with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Dear community member,

After conversion and migration from ECC on premise to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition with Rise envrionment , we remarks a folder is missing in /usr/sap/SID/. It is a customer folder created and we use it to store interface file from/to SAP Program and to store template file used by SAP Program.

We use FILE transaction for the logical file name/physical file name and we retrieve our logical file on /usr/sap/SID/xxx/yyy.

We try to create this one like /usr/sap/SID/userdata but it seems it is not possible.

How can we get this folder and its tree structure into the /usr/sap/SID/  folder?

Best regards,

Sarah

entry.title: Where can you find open APIs for SAP Cloud ALM?
entry.content: Where can you find open APIs for SAP Cloud ALM?

entry.title: Re: Empowering business to manage Decisions in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Thanks, @Sesh_Sreenivas . Great Blog for the most awaited feature!

We have followed the blog and help documentation whereas, the Studio application not visible in our HTML5 repo applications list. We have configured the pre-requisite 2 destinations and can already see the My Inbox application. Whereas Studio application still not visible. 

Our SBPA subaccount is in EU10 region. Not sure if anyone facing the same issue.

Please advise.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Stop automatic PR/PO conversion for MRP controllers
entry.content: Thanks for the guidance Dominik. I didn't check that ME59N has so much selection criteria in the bottom (scrolling down).

entry.title: CROSS PLANT STORAGE LOCATION GRN ISSUE FOR PRODUCTION ORDER.
entry.content:
As I am implementing a fastener manufacturing process, I have 3 plants: A, B, and C. The business requirement is to follow an MTO (Make-to-Order) process across all three plants. For this, the sales order is created in plant C. After that, MRP Live is scheduled in plant C.

Post-MRP, planned orders are created in all three plants using special procurement key 80 (Production in Alternative Plant) for semi-finished goods (SFGs) that are to be manufactured in plants A and B. Once the planned order in plant C is converted, corresponding planned orders are automatically created in the other plants.

Production order creation and release in each plant are working fine as per the defined process. However, during confirmation, after the material issue, the stock is being generated in the planning plant (plant C), not in the production plant (plant A or B). This is standard behavior when using special procurement key 80.

As per the business requirement, the physical locations of the plants are far from each other, so the client wants to transfer the material using the STO (Stock Transport Order) process.

How can this requirement be achieved?

entry.title: Re: Create custom tab in XD02/XD03 transaction
entry.content: First, do it. You'll see that it's automatically added at the end of the search help you append.

entry.title: Re: How to change target ledger group in depreciation area?
entry.content: what is the solution

entry.title: Re: Create custom tab in XD02/XD03 transaction
entry.content: As Sandra wrote, it is a search help. Please read about it. There is plenty information online. You have to put in some work, but this is the right way to achieve your requirement.

entry.title: Re: 1H2025 Release: What is the purpose of the new Standard Element of Company
entry.content:
Hello,
SAP has introduced this standard element in employee profile. Most of the companies created a custom string in employee profile to capture this. SAP has not provided much information but the plan might be using this in the latest people profile(profile preview, spotlight or full profile), as they are more focused in that area.

Br,
Namratha

entry.title: Re: "Hidden" Gems: 10 Underused Features in SAP SuccessFactors Core HR
entry.content:
Sven,

We would love to use the SuccessFactors mobile app for viewing payslips, but it doesn't work when you have payroll on ECC.  We have a hybrid environment with SuccessFactors EC replicating to ECC and have ECC payroll (not SF EC Payroll) running in SAP.  The mobile payslip app only works with SF EC payroll.  This is very disappointing and a sore spot for us.  The employees have to use their web browser to access SuccessFactors payslip URL links (payroll mashup).  Of course we will eventually have to migrate to another payroll system, like SF EC Payroll, but until then we have to deal with it.

SAP should make the mobile app work for all SAP customers and not just those on your latest payroll system.  SAP is leaving a lot of old, loyal SAP Payroll customers behind.

entry.title: Text is not visible in lower level of level based hierarchy with compounded key
entry.content:
I have an Analytics model over SAP SD data on ECC

I have created a Customer Sales dimension with level based hierarchy with 3 levels

Customer_Hier1

Customer_Hier2

Customer

Each has a text view connected to it

In the Analytic model both via preview or SAC I can see the hierarchy correct with test on the upper levels but no text on the lower level of Customer

When I display the object with flat hierarchy I do see the customer text

Thanks

Shlomi

entry.title: Re: CDS view entity : how to use domain value in WHERE cl...
entry.content: why you need to have it? can't  u type the hardcoded value?

entry.title: Re: Sustainability Control Tower: Update on SAP-provided Metrics on ESRS regulation
entry.content:
Dear @RenataKZ,

thanks a lot for your comment. You are correct. Those metrics you can see here in the list are all "planned". The blue ones have been additionally added to the "planned" list as part of the blog update on May 7th. As soon as some of these metrics get released, we will mark those as such. You can expect further updates on the planned metrics as well as released metrics in the upcoming week.

Thanks a lot for your patience and best regards,
Franziska

entry.title: BDCQ - Finance - Needs to be in sync with SAP Best Practice Scope Items List
entry.content:
@SAPSupport Hi,

It appears to me that BDCQ for Finance terminology needs to be in sync with terminology used in SAP Best practice scope items. E.g. Scope Item 1QM described as 'Advanced Financial Operations' in SAP Best practice scope items whereas same scope item described as 'Credit Evaluation and Management' in BDCQ.

 

Thanks

KP

entry.title: Re: FinOps Bookmarks Repository
entry.content:
Hi, While importing the package into our SAC tenant, we encountered the following error. Do you have the latest version of the package? Our tenant version is 2025.8.5.

Importing may not work for BTPRC FinOps Dashboard_2024.08_v2.0.0.package as it was created in an older version of SAP Analytics Cloud.

Do you have package which matches our tenant?

Regards,

Ganesha

entry.title: Re: Can the LDAP system be used for user details but igno...
entry.content:
Hi

In order to use the LDAP data source you need to enable the connector for the PROV scenario and include in the action 004. That makes technically the connector visible for requests.

Some alternatives (might be more):

- if you don't care that the connector is there and appears in ARM you can disable the actual provisioning in the Provisioning settings in SPRO and configure the connector to "no provisioning" as part of "system specific" provisioning settings

- If you pick a user and then select "existing assignments" the system appears because you've run the repository sycnch for the LDAP connector and you have the entry in GRACUSERCONN table. This is technically not needed if you use Realtime search for your datasource. parameter 2050 = YES. In such scenario each time you include a user in an ARM requests the user details are retrieved in realtime from the LDAP connector and and entry in GRACUSERCONN is not technically needed. that means you won't see the connector as part of "existing assignments" functionality. Realtime sych might impact performance in GRC and your LDAP connector so you might want to analyze the implementation carefully.

. You might be able also to use some restriction at auth object level to avoid the connector to be shown for some users.

Hope it helps

Diego

entry.title: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bengaluru, India)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use embeddings to improve your RAG response and build your own chatbot with memory.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday, June 20th, 2025 at Mindset Consulting, Bengaluru 🇮🇳 from 10:00am - 15:30pm IST. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructors will be Developer Advocates @Rekha_DR , @Shilpa_Shankar @sheenamk and @eshrinivasan.

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 40 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Рᴇферальный код MᴇXC: (124UTp)
entry.content:
Торгуйте Выгодно с MᴇXC: Получите до 8 000 USDT Бонусов в 2025 Году

Если вы хотите начать торговать криптовалютой с минимальными комиссиями и при этом получать щедрые бонусы — платформа MᴇXC станет отличным выбором. Это одна из крупнейших криптобирж в мире с миллионами пользователей и интуитивно понятным интерфейсом.

Просто зарегистрируйтесь с рᴇферальным кодом (124UTp) и получите скидку 20% на торговые комиссии навсегда, а также шанс заработать до 8 000 USDT в виде приветственных бонусов.

entry.title: Rule Context for Onboarding 2.0 is not set to No
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have a rule configured in EC which sets the email adress , email type and IsPrimary to visibility to None.

This Rule is impacting Onboarding too, hence I tried to go to Rule Context and set Onboarding = No. it Threw a warning that Rule Context is not supported of event type "OnInit".

We dont want this rule to be enabled in Onboarding but it should remain functioning in EC due to GDPR. How can we achieve this ?

Would appreciate your help.

Thanks and Regards,

Parul

Зареєструйтесь із рᴇферальним кодом (124UTp) — і отримаєте постійну знижку 20% на торгові комісії, а також можливість заробити до 8 000 USDT у вигляді вітальних бонусів.

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
Hello @mlauber,

Once the report is scheduled as application job, is there any change that we can run the report in foreground by assigning transaction to report as our requirement is that business user should be able to run the report in foreground as well and it is scheduled as background job for creating deliveries for the sales order.

Please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Is 5.0 fp01 release?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The FRUN 5.0 FP01 version is now available when calculating the FRUN update in the Maintenance Planner. Please see SAP Note 3603061 - SAP Focused Run 5.0 Feature Package 01 - Update Preparation and Postprocessing Documentation, and plan the update. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Código de rᴇferencia de MᴇXC: (124UTp)
entry.content:
Ahorra a lo Grande con MᴇXC: Cómo Obtener Hasta 8 000 USDT en Bonos en 2025

Si estás buscando comenzar a operar con criptomonedas ahorrando en comisiones y obteniendo recompensas atractivas, MᴇXC es la plataforma ideal. Con millones de usuarios en todo el mundo y una interfaz intuitiva, es perfecta tanto para principiantes como para traders avanzados.

Solo necesitas registrarte utilizando el código de rᴇferencia (124UTp) para recibir un descuento permanente del 20 % en comisiones y desbloquear hasta 8 000 USDT en bonos de bienvenida.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Hey friends!

The first time I heard about SAP was back in 2008, when I was working as a financial auditor. I came across a job posting from Indra (a Spanish consulting firm) looking for recent graduates to train in a strange accounting program called ERP SAP.

Back then, I’ll never forget the words of a President from a well-known bank in Buenos Aires (where I lived at the time).

He said:

“Give it a shot — you’ve got nothing to lose. Getting SAP certified is like having a passport to work anywhere in the world.”

Wise words...

... And here I am 😎

entry.title: Error- Identification of Condition SAP TDMS Time Slice Option
entry.content:
Hi,

We are getting the error while running the TDMS Time Slice project during the step 'Update of TDMS Header Tables with Business Process Data' at Step 'Identification of Condition Data'

Error in Log

We have raised an incident with SAP 336077/2025 we are still waiting for solution its been many weeks.

SAP advised to run the below query in Sender system which we have successfully executed and provided the results.

( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.LIKP as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knump FROM SAPABAP1.LIKP as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.VBAK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.VBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.EKBE as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_EKKO as b on a.ebeln = b.ebeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.EKKO as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_EKKO as b on a.ebeln = b.ebeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT KNUMV FROM SAPABAP1.EKBEH WHERE MANDT = 800 AND BUDAT >= 20240601 UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.WBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_WBRK as b on a.wbeln = b.wbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumvd FROM SAPABAP1.WBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_WBRK as b on a.wbeln = b.wbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT KKNUMV FROM SAPABAP1.ESLL WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 OR BUDAT = 00000000 ) OR ( INSDT >= 20240601 OR INSDT = 00000000 ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.ESLH as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.ESLL as b on a.packno = b.packno WHERE b.MANDT = 800 AND ( b.BUDAT >= 20240601 OR b.BUDAT = 00000000 OR b.INSDT >= 20240601 OR b.INSDT = 00000000 ) ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM SAPABAP1.rbdrseg WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM SAPABAP1.vfkp WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 ) OR ( prsdt >= 20240601 ) UNION ( SELECT a.eknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.vknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.cknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv_sd FROM SAPABAP1.wbhk as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wbhk as b on a.tkonn = b.tkonn WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv_mm FROM SAPABAP1.wbhd as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wbhk as b on a.tkonn = b.tkonn WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM "SAPABAP1"."/DBM/SPLHDR_DB" WHERE MANDT = 800 UNION SELECT h_knumv FROM "SAPABAP1"."/DBM/VBAK_DB" WHERE MANDT = 800 

We are facing this issue after the migrate our database to SAP Hana and we have upgrade the TDMS Backend component to DMIS and DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 to SP 0027.

Can some pls provide the solution.

SAP Test Data Migration Server SAP HANA, express edition

entry.title: MᴇXC Rᴇferans Kodu: (124UTp)
entry.content:
MᴇXC ile Büyük Tasarruf: 2025’te 8.000 USDT’ye Kadar Bonus Nasıl Alınır?

Eğer kripto para dünyasına adım atmak ve hem düşük komisyon ödemek hem de yüksek ödüller kazanmak istiyorsanız, MᴇXC sizin için ideal bir platformdur. Milyonlarca küresel kullanıcıya sahip bu platform, sezgisel arayüzü ile hem yeni başlayanlara hem de profesyonel yatırımcılara hitap eder.

Sadece rᴇferans kodu (124UTp) ile kaydolarak, ömür boyu %20 işlem ücreti indirimi kazanabilir ve 8.000 USDT’ye kadar bonusu hesabınıza tanımlayabilirsiniz.

 

Rᴇferans Kodu(124UTp)
PlatformMᴇXC
Komisyon İndirimi%20 Ömür Boyu
Toplam Bonus8.000 USDT’ye kadar
UygunlukSadece yeni kullanıcılar
GerekliliklerKYC, ilk yatırım, ilk işlem, görev tamamlama
Kampanya Süresi2025 yılı boyunca geçerli

entry.title: Re: SAP Document AI — The Roadmap for Seamless Document Processing in SAP Business Suite
entry.content: Hi @Cocquerel , now the video should be accessible. In case of questions, feel free to ask. Best, Tomasz
